result.stdout:
Description:
  JekyllNet CLI

Usage:
  JekyllNet.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  build  Build a Jekyll-compatible site
  watch  Rebuild the site when source files change
  serve  Build, serve, and optionally watch a Jekyll-compatible site

commands.payload:
Description:
  JekyllNet CLI

Usage:
  JekyllNet.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  build  Build a Jekyll-compatible site
  watch  Rebuild the site when source files change
  serve  Build, serve, and optionally watch a Jekyll-compatible site

result.stdout:
Description:
  Build a Jekyll-compatible site

Usage:
  JekyllNet.Cli build [options]

Options:
  --source <source>                  Jekyll site source directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-jekyllnet-0.1.7-9f4ddd99d3c544fd89744d816cbf35df]
  --destination <destination>        Build output directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-jekyllnet-0.1.7-9f4ddd99d3c544fd89744d816cbf35df/_site]
  --drafts                           Include content from _drafts
  --future                           Include content dated in the future
  --unpublished                      Include content with published: false
  --posts-per-page <posts-per-page>  Override pagination page size
  --verbose                          Write per-file build progress logs
  -?, -h, --help                     Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Build a Jekyll-compatible site

Usage:
  JekyllNet.Cli build [options]

Options:
  --source <source>                  Jekyll site source directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-jekyllnet-0.1.7-9f4ddd99d3c544fd89744d816cbf35df]
  --destination <destination>        Build output directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-jekyllnet-0.1.7-9f4ddd99d3c544fd89744d816cbf35df/_site]
  --drafts                           Include content from _drafts
  --future                           Include content dated in the future
  --unpublished                      Include content with published: false
  --posts-per-page <posts-per-page>  Override pagination page size
  --verbose                          Write per-file build progress logs
  -?, -h, --help                     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Build, serve, and optionally watch a Jekyll-compatible site

Usage:
  JekyllNet.Cli serve [options]

Options:
  --source <source>                  Jekyll site source directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-jekyllnet-0.1.7-9f4ddd99d3c544fd89744d816cbf35df]
  --destination <destination>        Build output directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-jekyllnet-0.1.7-9f4ddd99d3c544fd89744d816cbf35df/_site]
  --drafts                           Include content from _drafts
  --future                           Include content dated in the future
  --unpublished                      Include content with published: false
  --posts-per-page <posts-per-page>  Override pagination page size
  --verbose                          Write per-file build progress logs
  --host <host>                      Host interface for the local development server [default: localhost]
  --port <port>                      Port for the local development server [default: 4000]
  --no-watch                         Disable rebuild-on-change while serving
  -?, -h, --help                     Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
